# Qt-LogViewer Wiki

## Overview
Qt-LogViewer is a Qt-based desktop application designed for efficiently opening, viewing, searching, and filtering large log files. It supports multiple tabs, per-view filters, pagination for large datasets, and session management for saving and restoring workspaces. Features include a file explorer for grouping logs by application and session, and asynchronous data loading to maintain UI responsiveness.
